title: Boolean expressions in WHERE clause, result in incorrect resulsts
poc: create table boolean_test (b boolean not null, i int not null);
select * from boolean_test where b and (i < 3);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE boolean_test (b BOOLEAN NOT NULL, i INT NOT NULL, s STRING);
INSERT INTO boolean_test (b, i, s) VALUES (TRUE, 1, 'A'), (FALSE, 2, 'B'), (TRUE, 3, 'C'), (FALSE, 4, 'D');
CREATE TABLE additional_test (x INT NOT NULL, y BOOLEAN NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO additional_test (x, y) VALUES (5, TRUE), (6, FALSE), (7, TRUE);
SELECT * FROM boolean_test WHERE b OR (i > 2) AND (s IS NOT NULL);
